narrative:
Franklin Twp township has 1,913 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.1 percentage points.
